---
title: "survey2_qc101"
author: "QingyueChen"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

survey link: https://gui2de.surveycto.com/collect/qc101_survey2?caseid=
google sheet link: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TDA9HLP0yF1oww8OhC_ZGDY7nVip-Ksp/edit?gid=127937099#gid=127937099
